prompt: Two large puzzle pieces clicking together, each piece showing part of a database table. The left piece shows student names, the right shows course names, and where they connect shows the enrollment data linking them.
full_prompt: editorial illustration for a programming textbook. Two large puzzle pieces clicking together, each piece showing part of a database table. The left piece shows student names, the right shows course names, and where they connect shows the enrollment data linking them. Head First book illustration style, clean lines, slightly whimsical and humorous, warm colors, educational. Simple and clear. White background. Minimal or no text in the image.
